Package index

All functions

arguments()
Extract arguments from an object
augment.travelpath_fit
Augment a Trackframe with the Fit Output
change_point_permtest()
Change Point Permutation Test Specification
cvm_change_points()
Find Change Points
diagnose_crw()
Autorcorrelation
elapsed()
Extract Elapsed Time
estimate_racvm()
Estimate RACVM parameters
estimate_ucvm()
Estimating parameters of unbiased CVM
find_single_break_point()
Find single change point
fit(<travelpath_spec>)
Fit a Travelpath Model Specification
fitted(<travelpath_fit>)
Extract Fit
infomap()
Infomap Site Identification
n_segments() n_groups()
Accessor Functions for Segments and Groups
new_travelpath_fit()
Travelpath Fit
new_travelpath_spec()
Constructor for travelpath specification objects
plot_phases()
Plot Phases
register_argument_mapping()
Register an argument mapping for a model specification
register_fit_function()
Register a new fit function
segment_col() group_col()
Accessor Functions to Obtain Segment / Group Column
segment_meta() group_meta()
Metadata from a segmentation / grouping fit
sim_travel_path()
Generate Random Travel Path
sim_travel_paths()
Generate Multiple Random Travel Paths
specification()
Specification Accessor Function
subset_phase_list()
Subset a Phase List
summarize_phases()
Summarize phases
sweep_racvm()
Sweep RACVM
test_cp()
Test RACVM change point
threshold_stops()
Threshold-based Stop Detection
update(<travelpath_spec>)
Update a travelpath specification object
w_plot_phase_list()
Plot Phases and Associated Parameters
w_plot_phase_parameter()
Plot Phase Parameters
